basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has published the Junior Library Professional Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification under Advertisement No. C-53/2026-IIMK.HR. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Library Professional Assistant position on a contract basis with a monthly salary of Rs. 28,300. Candidates up to 30 years of age holding a First Class Master of Library & Information Science (MLISc) degree from a recognized university are eligible to apply online on or before 29 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and online application lin

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Library & Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized university with First Class
qualification.details: Master of Library & Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized university with First Class. Candidates must have completed their MLISc degree within the last three years (2023, 2024 or 2025). Strong proficiency in English communication.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Kozhikode Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Master of Library & Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized university with First Class. Candidates must have completed their MLISc degree within the last three years (2023, 2024 or 2025). Strong proficiency in English communication.

content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Salary 2026
IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Junior Library Professional Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Library Professional Assistant post at IIM Kozhikode?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Library Professional Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode is 29th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Library & Information Science (MLISc) degree from a recognized university with a First Class. Additionally, the MLISc degree should have been completed within the last three years (2023, 2024, or 2025).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Library Professional Assistant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Library Professional Assistant post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Library Professional Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,300 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Library Professional Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Library Professional Assistant post at the Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Junior Library Professional Assistant position at IIM Kozhikode must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Library Professional Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve a skill test, a presentation, and a personal interaction with the selection committee.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Library Professional Assistant at IIM Kozhikode is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode for more details.
